textByHash.db0bf2d32b471e6f2d1b58057a913cca77976d36: Oh thank you! It was really cold in there! But please, you must free my wife as well! Our son is depending on us!
textByHash.16d086332b3ad1763481a6b51aa88481c463f489: Phew! Am I glad to be out of that big ice cube! Are you okay too darling?
textByHash.c02e3f37474c2088a81b65b431e58f14363ff23e: You mean that diamond I found the other day belonged to him? But why didn't he just ask for it back? It's not like I really want it or anything!
textByHash.90b409bd9deb9775b8d278c040d5ef5d2718ca1f: And how did you know we had that diamond anyway, fleshy?
textByHash.1c424d9957b1f6bb8693020aa0a1a0a3d450e5ee: Yes, but he certainly inherited his Dad's smarts!
textByHash.09d375f03e1e07672ccc52d79ebb0fb62518d1b8: If he'd told this fleshy that he had the Diamond and not us, we might never have been rescued!
textByHash.1f1533fde09b7217753f2fa5c1716fc88cf176a6: Now, now dear, all's well that ends well. We've been freed and this fleshy has certainly earned himself that diamond.
textByHash.c06324a9368cab1c38d3abbd802f3592ef3bd94a: Let's get out of this terrible place and see our son!
textByHash.63b8065b678bf0300f8c5e26bfceeb827000179b: That's right son, and it's all thanks to this brave adventurer here. Now, make sure you hand over that diamond he was looking for.
textByHash.0125502306f43a424b259eb9614142c778b2db20: It has been nothing but trouble for us, let's just get back to our cave and have dinner.
textByHash.9504bf0c1d7a58c897bbd231d4c54414e8812f65: Thanks again for freeing me from that ice block! I might be a troll, but it was real uncomfortable in there!
